overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring wooden boardwalks, neon-lit market stalls, and atmospheric teal lighting. The player moves past food vendors and graffiti-lined corridors in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077) with cinematic ray-traced visuals and heavy rainfall throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian boardwalk with market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking along the rain-soaked wooden boardwalk, observing the neon-lit plaza and distant holographic advertisements

entered.detail: futuristic market stall with blue and yellow accents and metal framework
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark sky and neon lights
large floating advertisement with purple and white text visible in the distance
vertical cyan light posts illuminating the walkway ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide wooden boardwalk in a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza. Neon lights cast teal reflections on the wet surface while a covered market structure sits to the right. The camera moves forward through the open space toward distant palm trees and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with white canopy

events.description: character in orange jacket walks across the path from right to left
approaching the illuminated food stall with white canopy and warm lighting

agents.ego_description: turning toward the food stall while a pedestrian in an orange jacket crosses the wooden walkway ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking across the path from right to left

entered.detail: white fabric canopy with metal frame covering a food vendor area
futuristic grills and food preparation devices visible under the canopy

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and approaches a food stall with a white canopy. A pedestrian in an orange jacket crosses the path as the scene transitions from the open plaza to the vendor area. The covered market structure from the previous segment falls behind as the food stall becomes the focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food preparation area with cooking equipment

events.description: moving under the shelter of the food stall canopy, rain no longer visible on the ground

agents.ego_description: standing near the food stall examining the vendor and futuristic cooking equipment under the shelter

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the counter near the cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: The camera stops under the shelter of the food stall canopy, protected from the rain. The vendor stands behind futuristic cooking equipment while the camera pans to examine the details. A graffiti-covered wall becomes visible in the background on the left as the palm trees and neon pillars recede from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian walkway with graffiti art wall

events.description: leaving the food stall shelter and entering the narrow graffiti-lined corridor

agents.ego_description: walking away from the stall along the narrow wooden path, passing the graffiti-covered wall on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the shelter of the food stall and enters a narrow corridor with a graffiti-covered wall on the left. Rain becomes visible again as the scene opens into a longer walkway lined with cyan neon lights. The path stretches forward between the graffiti wall and vegetation on the right, with distant futuristic buildings visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit plaza into the sheltered intimacy of a market stall before ending in a narrow, graffiti-lined corridor. It begins on a rain-soaked wooden boardwalk where teal reflections shimmer under holographic billboards and distant palm trees. As the camera turns left, the open space of the plaza gives way to a food stall with a white canopy, passing a pedestrian in an orange jacket. The scene then shifts under the shelter of the canopy, where the camera pauses to examine futuristic cooking equipment against a backdrop of graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the camera leaves the shelter and moves back into the rain, gliding down a long walkway flanked by cyan neon lights and vegetation toward distant futuristic buildings.
